meaning: v.阻碍...发育,妨碍...生长,作惊人表演,使绝招n.发育迟缓,矮小的人(或物),惊人表演,绝技
examples: The band dressed up as the Beatles as a publicity stunt.
In a bold promotional stunt for the movie, he smashed his car into a passing truck.
Yakima Canutt was a famous cowboy stunt man.
Perhaps the most famous stunt rider on the internet, Macaskill is good at what he does.
Told of the incident, mayor Jim Fouts wasted no time in condemning the stunt.
